testcase.name: test_asignaciones_seed

failure.message: AssertionError: expected >=36, got 32 assert 32 >= 36 + where 32 = len([{'convocatoria_id': '43b9b70a-eedf-4580-9f78-927a473e8b96', 'created_at': '2026-06-02T04:20:49.462056+00:00', 'estado': 'Creada', 'etapa': 'Evaluación Colectiva', ...}, {'convocatoria_id': '43b9b70a-eedf-4580-9f78-927a473e8b96', 'created_at': '2026-06-02T04:20:49.463190+00:00', 'estado': 'Creada', 'etapa': 'Evaluación Individual', ...}, {'convocatoria_id': '43b9b70a-eedf-4580-9f78-927a473e8b96', 'created_at': '2026-06-02T04:20:49.464109+00:00', 'estado': 'Creada', 'etapa': 'Evaluación Individual', ...}, {'convocatoria_id': '43b9b70a-eedf-4580-9f78-927a473e8b96', 'created_at': '2026-06-02T04:20:49.464972+00:00', 'estado': 'Creada', 'etapa': 'Evaluación Individual', ...}, {'convocatoria_id': '43b9b70a-eedf-4580-9f78-927a473e8b96', 'created_at': '2026-06-02T04:20:49.465898+00:00', 'estado': 'Creada', 'etapa': 'Evaluación Colectiva', ...}, {'convocatoria_id': '43b9b70a-eedf-4580-9f78-927a473e8b96', 'created_at': '2026-06-02T04:20:49.466827+00:00', 'estado': 'Creada', 'etapa': 'Evaluación Individual', ...}, ...])

testcase.failure: tests/backend_test.py:234: in test_asignaciones_seed assert len(items) >= 36, f"expected >=36, got {len(items)}" E AssertionError: expected >=36, got 32 E assert 32 >= 36 E + where 32 = len([{'convocatoria_id': '43b9b70a-eedf-4580-9f78-927a473e8b96', 'created_at': '2026-06-02T04:20:49.462056+00:00', 'estado': 'Creada', 'etapa': 'Evaluación Colectiva', ...}, {'convocatoria_id': '43b9b70a-eedf-4580-9f78-927a473e8b96', 'created_at': '2026-06-02T04:20:49.463190+00:00', 'estado': 'Creada', 'etapa': 'Evaluación Individual', ...}, {'convocatoria_id': '43b9b70a-eedf-4580-9f78-927a473e8b96', 'created_at': '2026-06-02T04:20:49.464109+00:00', 'estado': 'Creada', 'etapa': 'Evaluación Individual', ...}, {'convocatoria_id': '43b9b70a-eedf-4580-9f78-927a473e8b96', 'created_at': '2026-06-02T04:20:49.464972+00:00', 'estado': 'Creada', 'etapa': 'Evaluación Individual', ...}, {'convocatoria_id': '43b9b70a-eedf-4580-9f78-927a473e8b96', 'created_at': '2026-06-02T04:20:49.465898+00:00', 'estado': 'Creada', 'etapa': 'Evaluación Colectiva', ...}, {'convocatoria_id': '43b9b70a-eedf-4580-9f78-927a473e8b96', 'created_at': '2026-06-02T04:20:49.466827+00:00', 'estado': 'Creada', 'etapa': 'Evaluación Individual', ...}, ...])

testcase.name: test_create_asignacion_auto_creates_eval
testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:1116: in json return complexjson.loads(self.text, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/__init__.py:346: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:337: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:355: in raw_decode raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: tests/backend_test.py:242: in test_create_asignacion_auto_creates_eval prop = requests.post(f"{API}/propuestas", json=p_payload, headers=admin_headers).json() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:1120: in json raise RequestsJSONDecodeError(e.msg, e.doc, e.pos) E requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)

testcase.name: test_brute_force_lockout

failure.message: AssertionError: expected 429 after 5 fails, got 401 assert 401 == 429

testcase.failure: tests/backend_test.py:483: in test_brute_force_lockout assert last_status == 429, f"expected 429 after 5 fails, got {last_status}" E AssertionError: expected 429 after 5 fails, got 401 E assert 401 == 429
